[2018-03-14 14:08] uno.pro (UnoPro): is there any reason not to play ranked right away
[2018-03-14 14:09] medar: you can't until you are XP level 20
[2018-03-14 14:09] uno.pro (UnoPro): yeh i just hit lvl 20
[2018-03-14 14:10] medar: well then you probably have done enough to learn the basics, so I don't see why not
[2018-03-14 14:10] coldstorm05 (Coldstorm): no real reason not to then
[2018-03-14 14:11] medar: unless you are the kind of person to take losses in ranked play too seriously, or put too much pressure on yourself or something
[2018-03-14 14:11] uno.pro (UnoPro): na just wanted to check it wasnt one of those systems that can punish u if you start and really suck
[2018-03-14 14:12] coldstorm05 (Coldstorm): you dont lose anything until tier 4 atleast
[2018-03-14 14:12] medar: nah, if you get good later it won't matter what you have done until then, you will be able to climb fast
[2018-03-14 14:12] uno.pro (UnoPro): ah sweet ill start ranked then
[2018-03-14 14:12] medar: oh there is the downside of ranked having all the units
[2018-03-14 14:12] medar: while casual only has the blueprints you have unlocked AFAIK
[2018-03-14 14:13] medar: so it might be a bit overwhelming at first. playing only base+5 and higher time controls might be a good idea
[2018-03-14 14:14] medar: but yeah, doesn't hurt to try 😃
[2018-03-14 14:15] uno.pro (UnoPro): so how is the mmr sysm
[2018-03-14 14:15] uno.pro (UnoPro): cause im vsing a guy who has master badge plus other good shit
[2018-03-14 14:16] Deleted User (Deleted User): When someone makes a step to aggressive trying to stop you from bying redeemer so you just spam guass cannons instead
[2018-03-14 14:16] medar: the update was supposed to limit matching between high skill gaps
[2018-03-14 14:16] p0lari (Polari): the player population still isn't huge and this isn't the most active time of day so there's a decent chance you get paired up
[2018-03-14 14:16] medar: I wonder if it considers new players to be average skilled?
[2018-03-14 14:17] dextr0nic: my first game was against this hearthstone player that was in the tournament
[2018-03-14 14:18] dextr0nic: so i think it is more of "testing the edge" at the beginning
[2018-03-14 14:18] dextr0nic: mayber considering your level also
[2018-03-14 14:18] uno.pro (UnoPro): maybe it takes casual mmr into account
[2018-03-14 14:18] uno.pro (UnoPro): i did ghet a couple wins over masters
[2018-03-14 14:18] dextr0nic: MM is always a big mystery ^^
[2018-03-14 14:19] dextr0nic: as long as it's fun i don't mind. The player population in ranked is really low and the fact that you keep your rank makes it more dense the higher you get
[2018-03-14 14:19] medar: there are a lot of variables that players can't see, so yeah, leads to a lot of speculation
